description_long: This helmet features a futuristic, high-tech design with a predominantly blue and black color scheme. The top of the helmet displays a realistic image of a human brain under a glossy, transparent dome, suggesting advanced neural or VR functionality. Multiple protruding elements, including cables, antennae, and circular modules, are distributed symmetrically on both sides, enhancing its cybernetic appearance. The front face has two rectangular, illuminated panels resembling digital eyes, and several tubes and connectors extend from the lower front and sides. The left and right sides are marked with a 'g VR Prototype 5.8' logo in white on a black background. The helmet appears to be constructed from hard plastic or composite materials, with visible seams and mechanical details.
description: A futuristic blue and black helmet with a brain dome, digital eye panels, and multiple cables and modules, marked as 'g VR Prototype 5.8'.
description_view_0: Left-side view showing the 'g VR Prototype 5.8' logo, brain dome, and several cables and circular modules.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the central circular port, symmetrical side modules, and the helmet's overall width.
description_view_2: Right-side view mirroring the left, with the logo, brain dome, and visible cables and modules.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the digital eye panels, multiple front-facing tubes, and the prominent brain dome.
attribute_brand_logo: A white 'g VR Prototype 5.8' logo on a black rectangular background, located on both left and right sides of the helmet.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: No visible ventilation openings or vents present on the helmet's surface.
attribute_graphic_design: Futuristic design with a realistic brain image on the dome, digital eye panels, and 'g VR Prototype 5.8' text logos; overall style is high-tech and cybernetic.
